name: CineCritics
description: Full stack CRUD project built with JS, PHP + JWT, and SQL. CineCritics is an interactive website for movie lovers where you can search for, find, and review your favorite movies from a database. If you change your mind, you can always delete or modify your review. All review interactions require an account.

name: Book Realm
description: Full stack project that uses Vue.JS as the frontend framework and PHP with MariaDB for the backend. Book Realm helps you find your next read by suggesting a random book and giving you all the information need. It also provides a search functionality that gives all the information needed about the searched book.

name: To-Do-Son
description: To-Do app written in Python that transcribes all your tasks in JSON format. It uses the JSON library for a cleaner and overall better code, the terminal is customized using the art library. The project is provided with a Jenkins + Groovy pipeline to automate the building, testing, and Docker Image phases of the project.

name: E-Portfolio
description: A personal e-portfolio to share who I am and my interests, among with my skills and projects I have built over the years. Built with React.JS and TypeScript; completely responsive.
